prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document does not apply to Scotland because it focuses on student loan data from England, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Scottish students are funded through a different system managed by the Student Awards Agency Scotland (SAAS), and their withdrawal notifications are not included in this report.
